edges.rationale: When burnout classifier signals fire, this module provides the emotional scaffolding for guilt and anticipatory grief that burnout often masks.
Guilt for asking for help is one of the guilt patterns this module names; the asking-for-help module provides practical scripts.
Anticipatory grief intensifies as end-of-life nears; this module addresses the 'wishing it was over' guilt that precedes the transitions module.
Placement guilt is named in this module; the transitions-placement module provides the decision-making scaffolding.
Solo caregiver guilt and sibling coordination guilt can lead to family conflict; this module names the guilt, conflict module addresses the dynamics.
